name: python3-pycurl
title: python3-pycurl
description:
Python bindings to libcurl (Python 3)
This module provides the Python bindings to libcurl. Please refer to
the libcurl documentation available in libcurl4-gnutls-dev Debian package.
.
NOTE: the SSL support is provided by GnuTLS.
.
This package contains PyCURL for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pycurl because Python bindings to libcurl (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pycurl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pycurl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pycurl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
